subcodes.first_line: O Ali! We have desired to make mention of thee and of them that have believed, on a Day which was inscribed in the Books of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی انا اردنا ان نذکرک و الذین آمنوا فی یوم کان مسطورا فی کتب الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
